patch.value: Token-budget context packer: diversity-aware selection, projection degradation, and bounded output for pm context/next
Turn ranked candidates into the most useful bounded-token context packet, shrinking projections before dropping relevant work.

pm context and pm next accept or derive an explicit token budget; packer preserves high-scoring required items, avoids near-duplicate context clusters, degrades projection depth before item omission, and reports budget accounting in json/debug output; behavior is measured by pm-cu1i token corpus and pm-atfm quality judgments; large-workspace output remains bounded by contract.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: searched all statuses for token budget packer/projection degradation/context ranking; existing items cover token measurement and pagination, but no packer implementation item existed.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Scope addition 2026-07-12 (pm-4k6b algorithms (18)+(19), definitions on that ledger): the packer surface owns (a) the explicit latency-budget parameter with threshold-algorithm early termination and a disclosed completeness certificate + degradation ladder in the envelope (algorithm 18), and (b) the task-set profile table keyed by triggering intent, with active-profile disclosure and safety-signal mask-immunity (algorithm 19). Learned-profile graduation is pm-uwfs (wave 4), not here.
